apiKey.confirmBody: This will create a new key and immediately invalidate the old one. Any scripts or integrations using the current key will stop working.
apiKey.description: Required for external API access (scripts, nzb360, etc.). The web UI does not need it.
apiKey.regenerateHint: Regenerating the key will invalidate the current one immediately.
apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.usageBody: Include the key in the <1>X-Api-Key</1> header when making API requests from external tools, scripts, or apps like nzb360.

backup.confirmImportBody: Importing will overwrite all current settings with the values from {{filename}}. This action cannot be undone.
backup.description: Export settings for backup or import from a previous export
backup.exportHint: Exports include all settings including service credentials. Keep the file secure.
backup.importSuccess: Settings imported successfully! The page will reload with new values.
backup.title: Backup & Restore

criticalAuto.description: Bypasses the grace period when critically low. Protected items are always skipped.
criticalAuto.title: Auto-delete immediately on critical pressure

diskPressure.description: Keep free space above a target — reclaim the lowest-value content only when space runs low

enable.description: Monitors real free space and acts only when below your target
enable.title: Enable reactive cleanup

observeOnly.description: Non-destructive — logs and notifies what it <1>would</1> reclaim without deleting. Turn off to let Prunerr act.
observeOnly.title: Observe-only mode

target.criticalThreshold: critical threshold ({{unit}}) — below this, reclaim with no grace
target.title: Keep free

diskPressure.title: Disk Pressure

display.description: Customize how dates, times, and sizes are shown
display.title: Display Preferences

exclusionPatterns.activeCount_one: {{count}} active pattern. Items matching any pattern will be skipped during rule evaluation.
exclusionPatterns.activeCount_other: {{count}} active pattern. Items matching any pattern will be skipped during rule evaluation.
exclusionPatterns.description: Items matching these patterns will be automatically protected from deletion during scans
exclusionPatterns.title: Exclusion Patterns

haptics.description: Vibration on touch interactions — supported mobile devices only
haptics.enableDescription: A subtle tap when opening, closing, and dismissing sheets. Saved per device.
haptics.title: Haptic Feedback

libraryExclusions.description: Choose which Plex libraries to include in scans. Excluded libraries will be completely skipped.
libraryExclusions.empty: No libraries found. Make sure Plex is configured and connected.
libraryExclusions.title: Library Exclusions

notifications.description: Configure alerts for deletions and events

discord.description: Send notifications to a Discord channel
discord.title: Discord Webhook

notifications.title: Notifications

auto.description: Refresh the library from Plex so new items appear without clicking "Sync Library"
auto.title: Automatic Plex Sync

plexSync.description: Automatically pull new movies and shows from Plex into Prunerr
plexSync.hourlyHint: Sync will run at this minute past each hour
plexSync.timeHint: Run before your scan so rules see the latest catalog
plexSync.title: Plex Library Sync

auto.description: Automatically scan library for items matching rules
auto.title: Automatic Scanning

autoProcess.description: Automatically delete items after grace period expires
autoProcess.title: Auto-Process Queue

schedule.hourlyHint: Scan will run at this minute past each hour
schedule.timeHint: Scan will run at this time
schedule.title: Scan Schedule

services.description: Connect to your media management services

descriptions.unraid: Server storage monitoring via GraphQL API

services.title: Service Connections

toasts.apiKeyRegeneratedMsg: Any scripts or integrations using the old key will need to be updated.

unraidHelper.note: This template creates a read-only API key with viewer permissions for monitoring array health and disk status.
unraidHelper.step1: Go to your Unraid server: Settings → Management Access → API
unraidHelper.step4: Paste the template below and click "Continue"
unraidHelper.step5: Copy the generated API key and paste it above
unraidHelper.title: How to create an API key

watchHistory.description: Connect a watch history service for tracking play counts and watched status

lookback.description: How far back to fetch watch history data
lookback.title: History Lookback

watchHistory.plexDirectInfo: No extra configuration needed — Prunerr will read history from your Plex server using the connection set in the Plex section above. Requires the server-owner's token.

plex.description: Uses your configured Plex server directly — no extra service required

watchHistory.title: Watch History Provider

webhooks.description: POST events to any URL — wire Prunerr into Home Assistant, n8n, or your own automations
webhooks.empty: No webhooks configured. Add one to start sending events.
webhooks.secretPlaceholder: Used to sign requests with X-Prunerr-Signature
webhooks.title: Outbound Webhooks
